summary: PHASE 28.4 Liquidation Cascade Probability testing completed successfully. All 4 API endpoints working correctly with comprehensive validation of cascade direction detection, probability calculation, severity classification, and integration with other microstructure modules.

minor_issues.issue: Required installation of pytest-asyncio for async unit tests

passed_tests: GET /api/v1/microstructure/cascade/BTC - returns complete cascade state
GET /api/v1/microstructure/cascade/ETH - returns complete cascade state
GET /api/v1/microstructure/cascade/summary/BTC - returns aggregated statistics
GET /api/v1/microstructure/cascade/history/BTC - returns history with limit support
POST /api/v1/microstructure/cascade/recompute/ETH - recomputes and stores cascade state
Cascade direction detection (UP/DOWN/NONE) - working correctly
Cascade probability calculation with alignment multiplier - validates 0.0-1.0 range
Cascade severity classification (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/EXTREME) - maps to probability thresholds
Cascade state classification (STABLE/BUILDING/ACTIVE/CRITICAL) - working correctly
Confidence calculation - returns valid 0.0-1.0 values
Input metrics integration - liquidation_pressure, vacuum_probability, sweep_probability present
Reason generation - produces meaningful explanations
Timestamp validation - proper ISO format
Multi-symbol consistency - different symbols handled correctly
History accumulation - stores records across multiple calls
Summary aggregation - direction/severity/state counts match totals
Integration data flow - receives data from MicrostructureSnapshot, LiquidityVacuumState, OrderbookPressureMap
Alignment multiplier effect - probability calculations vary appropriately
All 22 unit tests passed - covering direction detection, alignment calculations, severity classification, state classification
API routing integration - properly registered in main FastAPI server

success_percentage.backend: 100% (24/24 API tests passed, 22/22 unit tests passed)
